Meta.title: The Duck Sight Studio — Videomaker · Video creation & editing
Meta.description: Videomaker and video creation across Emilia-Romagna and Marche, Italy. Documentaries, storytelling and video editing by Giulia Repetto — The Duck Sight Studio.
Meta.keywords: videomaker, video creation, video editing, documentary filmmaker Italy, visual storyteller, Giulia Repetto

Hero.title: Stories worth watching
Hero.lede: Video creation, editing and narrative research across Emilia-Romagna and Marche, Italy. By Giulia Repetto — The Duck Sight Studio.

Stories.title: Portfolio
Stories.subtitle: A small collection of work. Click on any project to browse its full gallery.

Videos.title: Visions in motion
Videos.subtitle: Stories told through moving images. Fragments, atmospheres, different rhythms — a collection of original video projects.
Videos.emptyState: Videos are on the way. In the meantime, take a look at the channel.

Services.title: What I do
Services.subtitle: Three ways to tell the same thing: with calm, with care, with a point of view.

videomaking.title: Videomaking & video creation
videomaking.body: Documentaries, portraits, brand stories. From pre-production to final export: research, shooting, editing.

editing.title: Video editing
editing.body: Narrative editing, color grading, sound design. I also work on footage that needs a second voice.

voice.title: Voice & on-camera
voice.body: Narration for documentaries, podcasts and content. On-camera presence for interviews, hosting and hybrid formats.

Areas.title: Emilia-Romagna & Marche, Italy
Areas.subtitle: Freelance videomaker based in Romagna, working along the Adriatic coast. Available for travel across Italy and abroad.

About.title: The Duck Sight Studio
About.body: I'm Giulia Repetto. I make videos, narrative research, voice. I work on documentaries and stories that need time to be heard before they are seen. A freelance videomaker working across Cesena, Rimini, Pesaro, Ravenna and Bologna.

Contact.title: Got a project in mind?
Contact.body: Tell me your idea — even just to figure out together what it could become. I reply within 24 hours.

Footer.areas: Working across Cesena, Rimini, Pesaro, Ravenna and Bologna
